title: helianthemum × leucophaeum
intro: Helianthemum × leucophaeum, also known as the rockrose or frostweed, is a hybrid plant species within the family Cistaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum × leucophaeum include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties to combat infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in topical creams, ointments, and salves, as well as in teas and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects on human health.
